details.description: # Shelter-in-place order issued for neighborhood near Academy, Airport due to barricaded suspect. (KKTV) - The Colorado Springs Police Department (CSPD) issued a shelter-in-place order for residents in a neighborhood near South Academy Boulevard and Airport Road Wednesday night. CSPD issued the order at 8:11 p.m. for the area surrounding the 100 block of Audubon Drive, near South Academy and Airport. details.description: # Southeast Strong Neighborhood Plan. ## Public review of the draft Southeast Strong Neighborhood Plan. A draft of the Southeast Strong Neighborhood Plan is available for review by the public in both English and Spanish. Draft Southeast Strong neighborhood Plan. Draft Southeast Strong neighborhood Plan - Web accessible. The plan area is generally the southern half of Council District 4 that consists of six neighborhoods nestled between Interstate 25 and Powers Boulevard: Deerfield Hills, Pikes Peak Park North, Pikes Peak Park South, Soaring Eagles, Southborough, and Spring Creek. The Steering Committee for the Southeast Strong Neighborhood Plan consists of local government, non-profits, business groups, and resident representation from within the six neighborhoods that make up the 4A planning area. **​​​​​**Given the number and variety of existing plans already in place throughout the city, staff cannot make the overarching statement that the Southeast Strong Neighborhood Plan replaces all plans or that certain plans will not be folded into this plan – that will all be determined through the process of plan development and stakeholder engagement.
